mnemonics: AI AGENTS: Act, Goal, Environment, Nothing else matters
keyPoints: An AI agent perceives its environment through sensors.
It acts upon that environment using actuators.
Its behavior is governed by its goal or performance measure.
commonMistakes: Confusing an agent's architecture (the program) with the agent itself (the robot/car/software).
Forgetting that the performance measure evaluates the *sequence* of actions, not just a single action.
